title: AUSSIE EVA FANS
wikitext:
[]: AUSSIE EVA FANS...             Quote Post by KogareruAsuka » Fri Feb 18, 2011 11:11 am Evangelion fans prepare yourselves! Supanova Pop Culture Expo have announced over the weekend that Japanese voice actress Yuko Miyamura (Asuka from Evangelion, Casca – Berserk, Chun Li – Street Fighter Alpha) as well as her English counter part – Tiffany Grant (Asuka from Evangelion, Martel – Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood, Kaorin – Azumanga Daioh), will be appearing at both Brisbane and Melbourne events this April. To celebrate Madman and Supanova will also be bringing you the Australian English language premiere of Evangelion 2.0 You Are (Not) Alone exclusively at Supanova Expo Brisbane and Melbourne. Both actresses will be in attendance to help introduce the film as well. Also in attendance will be Matt Greenfield (ADR Director – Neon Genesis Evangelion) and Mike McFarland (Evangelion 2.22, Summer Wars)

[]:             Quote Post by insomniac » Fri Feb 18, 2011 6:59 pm Not really interested in the English dub screening, but hopefully this means the Australian 2.22 BD/DVD isn't too far from the American release.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri Feb 18, 2011 8:23 pm Only Melbourne and Brisbane, so I wont be there. Also, Australian release of 2.22 in June: [url]http://madboards.madman.com.au/viewtopic.php?p=856695#856695[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by insomniac » Fri Feb 18, 2011 11:47 pm Blah, 3 months' wait just like with 1.11.

To celebrate Madman and Supanova will also be bringing you the Australian English language premiere of Evangelion 2.0 You Are (Not) Alone exclusively at Supanova Expo Brisbane and Melbourne. Both actresses will be in attendance to help introduce the film as well. Also in attendance will be Matt Greenfield (ADR Director – Neon Genesis Evangelion) and Mike McFarland (Evangelion 2.22, Summer Wars)
